reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Estoy en el ACA de Jujuy lamentable atención, el playero a cargo de mi sector tonteando con una clienta demora y tienen una cola de 6 autos.

(Translated by Google)
I'm at the ACA in Jujuy, the service is terrible. The attendant in charge of my area is fooling around with a customer, causing delays, and there's a line of 6 cars.
